suppress.notes: CVE-2025-31651 affects Apache Tomcat 8.5.x (rewrite valve), not Tomcat 10.1 embedded.
CVE-2026-22733: CloudFoundry Actuator auth bypass (spring-boot-actuator). Not on classpath.
CVE-2026-22731: Actuator health-group path auth bypass. Not on classpath.
CVE-2026-40974: Cassandra SSL hostname verification in spring-boot-autoconfigure. Not on classpath.
